name: meeting-prep-3task
description: Build a meeting brief from company research, recent news, and a final prep memo

tasks.prompt: Research the company and write company-brief.json with keys: company, business_model, products, executives, current_priorities, recent_metrics, sources.
tasks.name: Company Researcher
tasks.scope: Background research for the target company

tasks.prompt: Collect recent news and signals for the company. Write company-news.json with keys: headlines, launches, partnerships, risks, talking_points, sources.
tasks.name: News Researcher
tasks.scope: Recent news, launches, partnerships, and risks

tasks.prompt: Read company-brief.json and company-news.json. Produce meeting-prep.md with executive summary, priority talking points, risks, and suggested questions for the meeting.
tasks.name: Briefing Writer
tasks.goal: Produce a concise meeting prep memo
tasks.scope: Synthesize company background and recent developments into a meeting brief
